name: SM Mojo-Grouped Invoice
html:
Spark Mojo Invoice #{{ doc.name }}

For: {{ doc.customer_name }}
Date: {{ doc.posting_date }}
Due: {{ doc.due_date }} {% if doc.payment_terms_template %} ({{ doc.payment_terms_template }}){% endif %}

{% set grouped = {} %} {% for it in doc.items %} {% set key = it.item_group or 'Other' %} {% if key not in grouped %}{% set _ = grouped.update({key: []}) %}{% endif %} {% set _ = grouped[key].append(it) %} {% endfor %} {% for group_name, lines in grouped.items() %}

{{ group_name.replace('Mojo: ', '') }}

{% for line in lines %} {% endfor %}
Action Qty Rack Discount Billed
{{ line.sm_invoice_line_label or line.item_name }} {{ line.qty }} {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(line.sm_quoted_rack_rate or line.rate, currency=doc.currency) }} {% if line.sm_discount_amount and line.sm_discount_amount > 0 %}-{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(line.sm_discount_amount, currency=doc.currency) }}{% else %}—{% endif %} {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(line.amount, currency=doc.currency) }}
Subtotal{{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(lines|sum(attribute='amount'), currency=doc.currency) }}
{% endfor %}
Subtotal: {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.net_total, currency=doc.currency) }}
{% if doc.total_taxes_and_charges %}Tax: {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.total_taxes_and_charges, currency=doc.currency) }}
{% endif %} TOTAL: {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.grand_total, currency=doc.currency) }}
